CMS pays each MA organization a monthly amount per beneficiary enrolled in its plan. Each year, CMS evaluates and updates 
the HCC model to incorporate changes in the diagnosis codes that map to HCCs.5 Periodically, CMS makes significant structural 
changes to improve predictive accuracy of the HCC model for subpopulations. For example, in 2017, CMS implemented version 
22 (V22) of the HCC model.6 It includes additional
